summary: Iteration 21 - Cricket Data APIs (LOT1-5) Testing Complete. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Live Ticker (12 IPL matches), IPL Points Table (10 teams with P/W/L/NR), Match Cards with team gradients, 4-tab MatchDetailPage (Contests, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts) with toss/winner info.

backend.ipl_points_table: PASS - GET /api/cricket/ipl/points-table returns 10 IPL teams with P/W/L/NR columns
backend.live_ticker: PASS - GET /api/cricket/live-ticker returns 12 IPL matches with team names/scores/status
backend.ipl_squads: PASS - GET /api/cricket/ipl/squads returns 10 teams with player details
backend.player_profile: PASS - GET /api/cricket/player/{id} returns Virat Kohli with career stats
backend.match_squad: PASS - GET /api/matches/{id}/squad returns 2 teams (KKR 27, MI 26 players)
backend.match_info: PASS - GET /api/matches/{id}/match-info returns toss winner/choice, match winner
backend.match_scorecard: PASS - GET /api/matches/{id}/scorecard returns full batting/bowling stats
backend.squad_without_cricketdata_id: PASS - Gracefully returns empty array for matches without cricketdata_id
backend.cricket_status: PASS - GET /api/matches/live/status shows CRICKET_API_KEY is set

frontend.homepage_live_ticker: PASS - Live IPL Ticker shows 12 matches with team logos (horizontal scroll)
frontend.homepage_points_table: PASS - IPL 2026 Standings shows 4 teams (MI, RCBW, CSK, DC) with P/W/L/NR columns
frontend.homepage_match_cards: PASS - 9 match cards with team color gradients and countdown/live/completed states
frontend.match_detail_4_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs visible: Contests, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts
frontend.match_detail_toss_info: PASS - Hero card shows 'Toss: mumbai indians chose to bowl'
frontend.match_detail_winner: PASS - Hero card shows 'Mumbai Indians won by 6 wkts'
frontend.squad_tab_team_selector: PASS - Squad tab shows KKR (27) and MI (26) team selectors
frontend.squad_tab_role_grouping: PASS - Players grouped by role: Wicket-Keepers, Batters, All-Rounders, Bowlers
frontend.fantasy_pts_top_performers: PASS - Top Performers list with Ajinkya Rahane (92), Finn Allen (57), etc.
frontend.fantasy_pts_innings_breakdown: PASS - Innings breakdown tabs: KKR Inn 1, MI Inn 1
frontend.scorecard_tab: PASS - Shows 220/4 vs 224/4, top scorer Ryan Rickelton (81), best bowler Shardul Thakur (3w)
frontend.contests_tab: PASS - Shows 2 contests with Join/Results buttons

critical_code_review_comments: cricket.py: All 5 IPL-level endpoints working correctly (points-table, live-ticker, schedule, squads, player)
matches.py: Match-specific endpoints (squad, fantasy-points, match-info) correctly use cricketdata_id with auto-linking
cricket_data.py: CricketData.org API integration with caching (60s for live, 30min for points, 1hr for squads)
HomePage.jsx: Live ticker with horizontal scroll, points table with View All toggle, match cards with team gradients
MatchDetailPage.jsx: 4-tab layout with lazy loading, toss/winner info in hero card, squad grouped by role
seed_data_creation: None - using existing KKR vs MI match (cricketdata_id: e02475c1-8f9a-4915-a9e8-d4dbc3441c96)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested all CricketData.org API integrations (LOT1-5). Key endpoints: /api/cricket/ipl/points-table (10 teams), /api/cricket/live-ticker (12 IPL matches), /api/cricket/ipl/squads (all team squads), /api/cricket/player/{id} (player profile), /api/matches/{id}/squad (match squad), /api/matches/{id}/fantasy-points (player points), /api/matches/{id}/match-info (toss/winner). Frontend: HomePage has live ticker, points table, match cards. MatchDetailPage has 4 tabs with toss/winner info. Use KKR vs MI match (id: e06a8963-410c-4901-bb96-807a3f258fe3) for testing completed match features.

features_verified.ipl_points_table: VERIFIED - 10 IPL teams with P/W/L/NR columns, team logos
features_verified.live_ticker: VERIFIED - 12 IPL matches with team names, scores, status (fixture/result/live)
features_verified.ipl_squads: VERIFIED - All 10 IPL team squads with player details (role, batting/bowling style)
features_verified.player_profile: VERIFIED - Player info with career stats by format (test/odi/t20i/ipl)
features_verified.match_squad: VERIFIED - 2 teams with players grouped by role (WK/Batters/Bowlers/AR)
features_verified.match_info: VERIFIED - Toss winner/choice, match winner, scores
features_verified.homepage_live_ticker: VERIFIED - Horizontal scroll with team logos and scores
features_verified.homepage_points_table: VERIFIED - IPL 2026 Standings with View All toggle
features_verified.homepage_match_cards: VERIFIED - Team color gradients, countdown/live/completed states
features_verified.match_detail_4_tabs: VERIFIED - Contests, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy Pts tabs
features_verified.match_detail_hero_card: VERIFIED - Toss info and match result displayed
